details: Use this guide to understand portal navigation, explore statewide datasets, and access specialized safety applications.
Review recent updates and release notes
Open the UWM IPIT program page
Visit secure login and enter assigned AccSafety credentials
Accept the mandatory data use acknowledgement before proceeding
After accepting policy notice once per browser, direct sign-in is available until consent reset.
Use Log out in the header when finished or switching accounts.
Contact UWM IPIT for password reset; self-service reset is not available.
Select Explore Available Datasets from portal home
Pedestrian only, Bicycle only, or Ped/Bike (Not Separated).
Click the View hyperlink beside location names to show trends
Map and locations appear only after selecting all three progressive filters.
Monitor computer-vision detections and safety insights around high-priority intersections.
Email UWM IPIT for data updates, account provisioning, and onboarding support.
